channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Victims to settle case against Epstein's longtime attorney, accountant: Documents
item.description: The co-executors of Jeffrey Epstein's estate have agreed to settle a class action lawsuit filed against them by survivors of Epstein's abuse for at le...

item.title: Trump considering initial limited strike against Iran, source says
item.description: Trump says "bad things" will happen if deal isn’t reached.

item.title: WATCH: Sports car slams into school bus in Florida
item.description: No serious injuries were reported after a Jaguar crashed into the back of a school bus in Florida. Fortunately, there were no children on the bus at t...

item.title: Crews hope to resume recovery of 8 bodies from California avalanche after days of dangerous weather
2/3: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: President Trump signs bill ending partial government shutdown; Mr. Trump says Republicans should "nationalize" elections.

item.title: Poland withdraws from treaty banning antipersonnel mines
item.description: Poland has officially left the Ottawa Convention, which bans the use of antipersonnel mines

item.title: 2/19: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Former Prince Andrew arrested over revelations in Epstein files; U.S. women's hockey team wins gold after victory over Canada.

item.title: Eric Dane, "Grey's Anatomy" star diagnosed with ALS, dies at 53
item.description: In April 2025, Eric Dane announced he had been diagnosed​ with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, or ALS.

item.title: See where homeowners pay the highest property taxes by county and state
item.description: The median property tax bill in the U.S. soared 30% between 2019 and 2024, compounding the financial pressures on millions of Americans.

item.title: 2/19: CBS Evening News
item.description: Former Prince Andrew released but not cleared after arrest in connection with Epstein files; NASA’s new head criticizes Boeing, NASA for botched Starl...

item.title: Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say
item.description: The Palestinian Health Ministry and a witness say that Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank shot and killed a Palestinian American in an attack ...

item.title: WATCH: What’s next for former Prince Andrew after his arrest?
item.description: International attorney Ann Olivarius breaks down potential criminal pathways, jurisdictional hurdles and investigative next steps.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
